metadata.name: New Module 2
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: The royal treasury was plundered and its relics hidden in dungeons across the realm. Reclaim them and return them to the vault in Ironreach.

towns.name: Ironreach
towns.description: A forest clearing settlement where druids and woodsmen live side by side.

towns.name: Larkford
towns.description: A quiet hamlet nestled among rolling hills, known for its warm hearths.

key_dungeons.name: Lost Cavern
key_dungeons.description: Moss-covered statues flank the entrance to Lost Cavern. Their blank eyes seem to follow you.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Descend into Lost Cavern and find the Coral Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The passage grows more treacherous with every floor.
